# .tldr

Internal tldr command-line reference cache for tracking auto-completion data and build status.

## Contents

- [languages.json](./languages.json) — exports `languages` array (`["javascript", "rust"]`) and `timestamp` (Unix epoch float, 1772429893)
- [status](./status) — exports `stopped` literal string; marks build/test state as inactive
